docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY HILL-DAVID, ERMA AS TO DEFENDANT UALESI, FAASOA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-22-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF HILL-DAVID, ERMA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $68.00) SERVED JUL-30-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT UALESI, FAASOA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-22-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-22-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-22-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HILL-DAVID, ERMA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UALESI, FAASOA $6,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $143.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,143.00, PAYMENTS TO ME MADE BY CASHIERS CHECK. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $500.00 PER MONTH, BEGINNING ON OCT-07-2015 AND ON THE 7TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $398.87 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT UALESI, FAASOA
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF HILL-DAVID, ERMA AS TO DEFENDANT UALESI, FAASOA
